name: -s
--symbolic
options.description: Create a symbolic link instead of a hard link

name: -i
--interactive
options.description: Prompt before removing an existing destination

name: -n
--no-dereference
options.description: Treat a symlink to a directory as a normal file

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Print the name of each linked file

args.name: target
args.description: Existing file the link points to

args.name: link-name
args.description: Name of the link to create
